entries.definition:
كتاب الباء

بوه - بيت

(بيت) الباء والياء والتاء أصلٌ واحد، وهو المأْوَى والمآب ومَجْمَع الشّمْل. يقال بيتٌ وبُيوتٌ وأبياتٌ. ومنه يقال لبيت الشِّعر بيتٌ على التشبيه لأنه مَجْمَع الألفاظِ والحروفِ والمعاني، على شرطٍ مخصوصٍ وهو الوَزْن. وإيَّاهُ أراد القائل:

بأسمَرَ مَشْقُوق الخياشِيم يَرْعُفُ

وبَيتٍ على ظَهْرِ المَطِيّ بَنَيْتُه

b–y–t tent, dwelling, abode, quarters; family; to spend the
night, to do something at night; to raid by night, (of food) to
become stale. Of this root, five forms occur 73 times in the
Qurʾan: يَبِيتُونَ yabītūn once; بَيَّتَ bayyata four times; بَيْت bayt 28

121
entries.definition_english:
b–y–t tent, dwelling, abode, quarters; family; to spend the
night, to do something at night; to raid by night, (of food) to
become stale. Of this root, five forms occur 73 times in the
Qurʾan: يَبِيتُونَ yabītūn once; بَيَّتَ bayyata four times; بَيْت bayt 28

121

entries.definition:
times; بُيُوت buyūt 37 times and بَيَات bayāt three times.
يَبِيتُ yabītu [imperf. of v. بَاتَ bāta, intrans.] to pass the night, to
spend the night (25:64) وَالَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَامًا those who spend
the night bowed down or standing in [constant] prayer.

بَيَّتَ bayyata [v. II, trans.] 1 to do/decide something at night
(4:108) يَسْتَخْفُونَ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَلَا يَسْتَخْفُونَ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَهُوَ مَعَهُمْ إِذْ يُبَيِّتُونَ مَا لَا يَرْضَىٰ
مِنَ الْقَوْلِ they hide from people, but they cannot hide from God, for
He is with them while they plot at night discourse that He does
not like 2 to raid someone at night; to kill someone at night
(27:49) قَالُوا تَقَاسَمُوا بِاللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُ وَأَهْلَهُ they said, ‘Swear to one another
[that] by God we shall attack him and his household in the night.’

بَيْت bayt [n., pl. بُيُوت buyūt] 1 tent (16:80) وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّن جُلُودِ الْأَنْعَامِ
بُيُوتًا تَسْتَخِفُّونَهَا يَوْمَ ظَعْنِكُمْ وَيَوْمَ إِقَامَتِكُمْ and He has provided for you, from
the hide of cattle, tents [lit. houses] that you find light on the day
you travel and on the day you settle down 2 dwellings, rooms,
houses (7:74) وَتَنْحِتُونَ الْجِبَالَ بُيُوتًا and hewing the mountains into
houses 3 mosques, places of worship (24:36) فِي بُيُوتٍ أَذِنَ اللَّهُ أَن تُرْفَعَ
وَيُذْكَرَ فِيهَا اسْمُهُ in houses of worship, God has ordained that they be
raised high and His name be remembered in them; *(2:125) الْبَيْتَ
the House [at Mecca]; *(5:2) الْبَيْتَ الْحَرَامَ the Sacred House [in
Mecca]; *(33:33) أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ members of the Prophet’s household
[lit. people of the House] 4 building (24:29) لَّيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَن تَدْخُلُوا
بُيُوتًا غَيْرَ مَسْكُونَةٍ فِيهَا مَتَاعٌ لَّكُمْ you will not be blamed for entering
vacant/public buildings [lit. uninhabited houses] in which there is
some errand/business for you.

بَيَات bayāt [v. n. used adverbially] at night, during the night; as
a night raid (7:97) أَفَأَمِنَ أَهْلُ الْقُرَىٰ أَن يَأْتِيَهُم بَأْسُنَا بَيَاتًا وَهُمْ نَائِمُونَ do the
people of these towns feel secure that Our punishment will not
come upon them by night, while they are asleep?
entries.definition_english:
times; بُيُوت buyūt 37 times and بَيَات bayāt three times.
